metadata.name: Semaphore UI
metadata.description: Modern web UI for Ansible automation with task scheduling, inventory management, and playbook execution. Ideal for teams who want a user-friendly way to run and monitor Ansible.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Modern web UI for Ansible automation with task scheduling, inventory management, and playbook execution. Ideal for teams who want a user-friendly way to run and monitor Ansible.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` and `.env` as files.

1. Decide on service names, ports, volumes, credentials, and optional integrations before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in the required variables first, then enable optional sections such as Traefik, metrics, or extra services only when needed.
3. Render the Compose project, review the generated files, and start it with Docker Compose in the target directory.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Name of the service; optional; default: semaphoreui.
- `container_name`: Name to use for the container; optional; default: semaphoreui.
- `restart_policy`: Policy used for Restart; required; default: unless-stopped; options: unless-stopped, always, on-failure, no.
- `secret_key`: Secret key for encrypting access keys; required.
- `admin_user`: Username for the administrator; required; default: admin.
- `admin_name`: Name to use for the administrator full; required; default: Administrator.
- `admin_email`: IP address to use for the administrator email; required; default: admin@home.arpa.
- `admin_pass`: Password for the administrator; required.
- `ansible_host_key_checking`: Enable Ansible SSH host key checking; optional.

### Ports
- `ports_http`: Host port exposed for HTTP; optional; default: 3000.

### Traefik
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_host`: Hostname used for Traefik; optional.
- `traefik_domain`: Domain used for Traefik; required.
- `traefik_network`: Network used for Traefik; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable Traefik TLS; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik Tls Certresolver; required; default: cloudflare; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.

### Database
- `database_type`: Database engine to use; optional; default: sqlite; options: sqlite, postgres, mysql.
- `database_path`: Path to the SQLite database file; optional; default: /etc/semaphore/semaphore.sqlite; shown when: database_type=sqlite.
- `database_name`: Name of the database; optional; default: semaphore; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql.
- `database_user`: Username for the database; optional; default: semaphore; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql.
- `database_host`: Hostname used for Database; required; default: postgres; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql and database_external=true.
- `database_password`: Password for the database; required; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql.
- `database_external`: Use external database; optional; default: false; shown when: database_type=postgres,mysql.

## References
- [Semaphore UI](https://www.semaphoreui.com/)
- [Documentation](https://docs.semaphoreui.com/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/semaphoreui/semaphore)
## Notes
- Supports SQLite (default), PostgreSQL, and MySQL as database backends. SQLite works for small deployments; PostgreSQL or MySQL is recommended for larger installations.

## Next Steps
Log in with your initial admin user:
```bash
Username: << admin_user >>
Password: << admin_pass >>
```
